title: The M Factor: Shredding the Silence on Menopause
original_title: The M Factor: Shredding the Silence on Menopause
overview: Menopause is a silent epidemic affecting the health and well-being of millions of women. This film confronts this neglected crisis, challenges societal and medical shortcomings and advocates for a revolutionary approach to women's health.
